# AuditReady Campaign Plan

## Objective

Build qualified-demo demand for a controlled-document workflow platform among life sciences quality teams.

## Audience and targeting

Product: Controlled-document workflow platform
Market: Mid-market life sciences quality teams
Locale: US
Geographies: United States, Canada
Industries: Biotech, Medical devices
Company sizes: 200-1000, 1000+
Company names: Northstar Biologics, Apex Medical Systems
Account lists: Tier 1 regulated accounts
Job titles: VP Quality, Director of Quality Assurance
Job functions: Quality, Operations
Seniorities: Director, VP
Skills: Quality management systems, GxP compliance

## Demand signals and controls

Keywords: eQMS software, audit readiness
Pains: manual document control
Gains: faster audit preparation
Objections: migration effort
Triggers: upcoming regulatory inspection
Exclusions: Current customers
Negative keywords: jobs, training
Suppression lists: active opportunities
Campaign goal: qualified demo requests
Budget: $20,000
Conversion event: Qualified demo request
Measurement thresholds: 30 qualified demo requests
Audience-sizing requirements: 10,000 reachable members
Preferred channels: linkedin-ads, google-ads-youtube, microsoft-ads
